hooks.command: cmd=$(node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); process.stdout.write((d.tool_input||{}).command||'')" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])(-f|--force|--force-with-lease|--force-if-includes)([[:space:]]|=|$)'; then printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"強制push（--force / -f / --force-with-lease / --force-if-includes）は全branchで禁止されています"}}'; exit 0; fi; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '([[:space:]]|:)(main|develop)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"main / develop ブランチへの push は禁止されています。PR 経由でマージしてください"}}'; exit 0; fi; exit 0

input=$(cat); f=$(echo "$input" | node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); process.stdout.write((d.tool_input||{}).file_path||'')" 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in */admin/frontend/*) (cd admin/frontend && npm run type-check && npm run lint) ;; */shift/frontend/*) (cd shift/frontend && npm run type-check && npm run lint) ;; */admin/api/*) (cd admin/api && npm run build) ;; */shift/api/*) (cd shift/api && npm run build) ;; esac; exit 0
